section.title: The vision behind Zewarish.
section.subtitle: Driven by a passion for timeless style, everyday elegance, and thoughtfully curated jewellery.

members.name: Mahvish Siddiqui
members.bio: Mahvish carefully curates every Zewarish collection, selecting elegant anti-tarnish jewellery that blends timeless design, everyday comfort, and affordable luxury. Her vision is to make premium-looking jewellery accessible for every woman, every day.
